summary: Settings & Dashboard Revenue Features - All Tests Passed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: Settings page loads, Notifications modal opens with 7 toggle switches, Privacy modal opens with 3 toggle switches, Download Data button functional, Mentor Dashboard loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/users/me/settings returns proper default notification and privacy settings structure
PUT /api/users/me/settings correctly persists notification and privacy changes
GET /api/users/me/export returns complete user data export with all sections (account, profile, settings, posts, bookings, purchases) - password_hash excluded as expected
GET /api/pro/dashboard now includes total_offer_sales and total_offer_revenue fields - revenue aggregation fixed
GET /api/pro/earnings includes total_earned_bookings and total_earned_offers breakdown
Frontend Settings page properly integrated with backend APIs - no 'Coming Soon' alerts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported issues are now fixed: 1) Mentor dashboard revenue now includes offer purchases (total_offer_sales, total_offer_revenue fields in /api/pro/dashboard and total_earned_bookings, total_earned_offers in /api/pro/earnings), 2) Settings page is fully functional - Notifications modal has 7 toggle switches, Privacy modal has 3 toggle switches, Download Data exports user JSON file. Backend endpoints: /api/users/me/settings (GET/PUT), /api/users/me/export (GET), /api/pro/dashboard (GET), /api/pro/earnings (GET) - all working correctly.

backend_settings_endpoints.PUT /api/users/me/settings: PASS - Updates notifications and privacy settings
backend_settings_endpoints.GET /api/users/me/export: PASS - Returns complete user data export

frontend_settings_page.page_loads: PASS - Settings page loads without errors
frontend_settings_page.notifications_modal: PASS - Opens with 7 toggle switches (new_message, new_booking, booking_confirmed, new_review, community_reply, price_alerts, promotions)
frontend_settings_page.privacy_modal: PASS - Opens with 3 toggle switches (profile_public, show_activity, show_portfolio)
frontend_settings_page.download_data: PASS - Button visible and clickable, triggers data export

frontend_mentor_dashboard.page_loads: PASS - Dashboard Mentor page loads with stats cards
